name: codex-spec-opc
description: Codex runtime guard plugin for OpenSpec OPC workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Runtime guardrails for OpenSpec-driven Codex workflows.
interface.longDescription: Prevents Codex from writing business code until OpenSpec planning, task quality, and test gates are satisfied.
defaultPrompt: Start an OpenSpec change and stop code edits until apply-ready.
Enforce red, green, verify phases for my current work item.
